channel.title: release on Aperspection
channel.description: Recent content in release on Aperspection

item.title: Oceana
item.description: History Spotify Spotify - Oceana Radio Edit Spotify - Oceana EP YouTube YouTube - Oceana - Radio Edit YouTube - Oceana - full version Soundcloud Shazam Final Note History The track Oceana was written in 2012. It was one of the first full tracks I made that I was able to polish into a pleasant sound. This track embodies what I love about electronic music:

item.title: This Is Not My Homework
item.description: History Spotify YouTube Apple Music/iTunes Final Note History Written around 2014 while attending university and putting off some upcoming homework assignments, This Is Not My Homework is a track with a bit more of an edge. I was experimenting with making bigger bass sounds and this is the result. At the time, sharing the production of this track with friends was a blast. The song has a pretty standard beat for the first half; the latter half is where the action is, taking inspiration from Wolfgang Gartner, and a soundtrack to a portal-like isometric puzzle video game I once played, but sadly cannot remember to this day.

item.title: Depthseeker
item.description: Summary Spotify album Individual Tracks Reflex Desolate Paradigm Emotion, Not Control Interlude I Oceana Twilight Knockdown Freefall Float With Me Glowing Streamer Interlude II On the Edge All Colors Chillville Sonascape Interlude III Blood Rush Epiphany Interlude IV Corporeal Echo A Trip to Maldives Float With Me (Radio Edit) Final note Summary Depthseeker is a collection of songs from the years 2012-2016. A few interludes allow for transitions between songs that share a similar feel.
